description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a prominent attached garage at the front. The exterior walls are clad in gray brick, and the roof is covered with dark gray shingles. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, large windows, and a double garage door. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and landscaped with grass, shrubs, and two tall conifer trees on either side. The rear of the house has expansive windows and a sliding glass door, providing access to the backyard. The overall design is modern suburban, with clean lines and practical features for family living.
description: A modern two-story suburban house with a gable roof, gray brick exterior, attached garage, and fenced yard with landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, covered porch, main entryway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, brick wall, and wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a sliding glass door, and the backyard area within the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage side, gable roof, and additional landscaping along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and grouped panes
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and overhanging roof
